Class AtomSite

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.natural.biology.loaders.pdbml.AtomSite
public class AtomSite extends Object
Atomic coordinate record.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
